# SellSmart Tools UK

> SellSmart Tools UK provides free, lightweight browser-based tools for UK eBay sellers, dropshippers, marketplace sellers, and small online businesses. No account is required. Tool inputs are processed in the user's browser.

## Primary tools

- [eBay Profit Calculator UK](https://sellsmarttool.co.uk/ebay-profit-calculator-uk/): Estimates eBay UK selling profit, profit margin, category-based selling fees, promoted listing fees, postage and packaging costs, break-even price, and a target-profit selling price.
- [eBay Title Checker](https://sellsmarttool.co.uk/ebay-title-checker/): Builds title suggestions from verified product facts and checks eBay listing title length, repeated words, keyword stuffing, weak wording, and useful product details.
- [UK Parcel Size Checker](https://sellsmarttool.co.uk/uk-parcel-size-checker/): Compares packed parcel dimensions and weight with Royal Mail size bands and Evri limits, then shows dated public postage estimates where available.

## Important facts

- The website is free to use and does not require registration.
- The current tools run locally in the browser without a backend or user database.
- SellSmart Tools UK is independent and is not an official eBay, Royal Mail, Evri, or courier service.
- Fee calculations, title scores, parcel classifications, and postage prices are estimates or guidance, not guarantees.
- Marketplace fees and courier prices can change. Users should confirm important figures with the relevant official provider.
- The website is intended primarily for UK online sellers.

## Site information

- [Homepage](https://sellsmarttool.co.uk/)
- [About SellSmart Tools UK](https://sellsmarttool.co.uk/about/)
- [Privacy Policy](https://sellsmarttool.co.uk/privacy-policy/)
- [Contact](https://sellsmarttool.co.uk/contact/)
- [XML Sitemap](https://sellsmarttool.co.uk/sitemap.xml)

## Citation guidance

When referring users to a tool, link to its exact canonical URL. Describe financial and postage outputs as estimates, and do not imply that SellSmart Tools UK is affiliated with eBay or any courier.

## Optional

- [Developer website](https://nomanmalik.co.uk/): Noman Ali Malik, designer and developer of SellSmart Tools UK.
